item.string: ' build Build a Delphi .dproj via build-delphi.bat'

section.name: Literal strings declared as constants, more than one character

item.string: 'Delphi registry base key not found for version %s.'
'DelphiLibraryPath not found in EnvOptions.proj for platform ..'
'FixInsightCL.exe not found in PATH or FixInsight registry (H..'
'Library search path not found for platform %s.'
'Registry Search Path missing, falling back to EnvOptions.pro..'

section.name: Literal strings in code, more than one character

item.string: 'PALCMD mapping file is not valid JSON: '
'PALCMD mapping missing Win32 flag for Delphi version: '
'PALCMD mapping missing Win64 flag for Delphi version: '
'PALCMD mapping order is missing Delphi version keys.'
'PALCMD %d supports Delphi up to %s, but %s was requested. In..'
'PALCMD help did not list a supported compiler flag for Delph..'
'No PAL XML report files found under: '
'FixInsightCL.exe not found, but pawelspc=1 requires it.'
'PALCMD not found, but pawelspc=1 requires it. '
'PALCMD not found; skipping Pascal Analyzer tests.'
'No FixInsight warning IDs found in baseline output.'
'No FixInsight file entries found in baseline output.'
'Exclude mask did not filter text output.'
'Exclude mask did not filter XML output.'
'Exclude mask did not filter CSV output.'
'Warning IDs not filtered from text output.'
'Warning IDs not filtered from text output.'
'Warning IDs not filtered from XML output.'
'Warning IDs not filtered from XML output.'
'Warning IDs not filtered from CSV output.'
'Warning IDs not filtered from CSV output.'
'PALCMD supports Delphi 12, but a different flag was selected..'
'PALCMD does not list /CD12W32; skipping integration run. Fla..'

section.name: Literal strings that could be replaced with constants/resourcestrings, more than one character
